raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom signed Assembly Bill 342 to combat the Trump Administration's plans for oil drilling in protected lands.",
    "The Trump administration is pursuing an aggressive energy policy that opens more federal land to oil and gas exploration and production.",
    "The Bureau of Land Management approved an oil and gas exploration plan that permits leasing on hundreds of thousands of acres of federal land in Central California.",
    "Assembly Bill 342 prohibits new pipelines and infrastructure on state lands that would support new oil and gas production.",
    "California has jurisdiction over the use of state lands, including leasing authority in those areas."
  ]
}
```
